observations.statement: The failure contains a locator-not-found exception.

hypotheses.statement: The locator likely no longer matches the intended element.

missingEvidence: A current DOM snapshot would distinguish a changed locator from a wrong page state.

recommendedActions.title: Inspect the locator
recommendedActions.action: Compare the locator with the current application DOM before changing synchronization.

limitations: Only the submitted redacted exception evidence was analyzed.
